overall.description: A static shot of a futuristic corporate lobby or lounge area rendered in a game engine, featuring modern gray sofas, large windows showing passing clouds, and a glowing digital display on the back wall. The scene remains stationary throughout with subtle lighting changes as clouds move across the sky outside.

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static position in a futuristic corporate lounge featuring modern gray seating in the foreground and a large digital display on the far wall. Natural light filters through tall windows on the left, where clouds drift across the sky causing subtle lighting variations. The space includes an upper mezzanine level with glass railings and sparse plant decoration, remaining completely empty of people throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective within a futuristic corporate lounge where the atmosphere shifts subtly through changing natural light. It begins with a view of modern gray seating in the foreground and a large digital display anchoring the far wall. As clouds drift across the sky visible through tall windows on the left, the lighting across the interior surfaces fluctuates in a soft, rhythmic pattern. The scene then encompasses the architectural depth of the space, revealing an upper mezzanine with glass railings and sparse plant decorations. The camera remains fixed, capturing the stillness of the empty environment as the external weather continues to modulate the interior glow.
